chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D- 2715 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 13084/23 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 20.06.2023. Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Saad Shafiq Siddiuqi, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Qazi Ayazuddin Qureshi, Assistant Attorney General. ________________ Learned Counsel submits the Order-in-Original has been passed against the Petitioner, however, an appeal has been preferred, which is pending before the Customs Appellate Tribunal. He further submits that pursuant to an ad-interim order, goods were directed to be released by securing the disputed amount of duty and taxes as mentioned in Order-in- Original directly with the department, whereas, in respect of fine and penalty with the Nazir of this Court in the shape of pay order or bank guarantee, which stands complied with. Therefore, apparently, this Petition has served its purpose. In view of the above, this Petition stands disposed of, whereas, the fate of the amount lying with the Nazir of this Court shall be subject to final outcome of the Appeal pending before the Tribunal. J U D G E J U D G E Ayaz
